codeReview.summary: Current HEAD contains the claimed feature-scoped test coverage in tests/market-refresh.test.ts, and the reviewed commit cleanly isolates that file. The added coverage matches the feature requirements for non-null converted ticker fields, exchange volume point recording, graceful partial failures, cooldown behavior, and HTTP exchange route stale/live exposure.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, commit d2dcb5c, transcript skeleton, skill instructions, and current HEAD test code. The implementation is present at current HEAD, the commit is properly scoped to tests/market-refresh.test.ts, and I found no blocking issues.
